case_title: KIMBERLY BLACKMON VS. RES-CARE, INC., A KENTUCKY CORPORATION DBA TREASUR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLACKMON, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT RES-CARE, INC., A KENTUCKY CORPORATION DBA TREASURE ISLAND JOB CORPS CENTER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
